data.raceComments: {"comment":"This is tough. 7. MAGIC LEPRECHAUN hasn't had much luck since his win in this grade at Kyneton. Maps well enough, and he's capable of a much sharper run in this line-up. 4. KID DYNAMITE bled last time and resumes after 190 days. He's right up to this if presented forward. His jumpouts suggest he will be, and he needs average luck from a wide gate. 8. MOAKSUN resumed at Ballarat and wasn't far away after losing a plate. Goes well second-up and comes back a few levels. He has more to give and can use the inside barrier. 3. BLUE MOON SUMMIT resumes for the Ivill yard and has pieces of form that would give him a chance. Has Newitt aboard and the late betting will be key.","runners":[7,4,8,3],"exclusive":false}

extraMarkets.name: SEYMOUR-R9-Fav Out
